reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This unmarks the element by setting it to 1, but since it was set to 0 above (which means unused), this causes incorrect backtracking. The correct sequence is: mark as used (1), recurse, then unmark (0).]
